Rinse lentils to clean off broken grains and excess starch
Combine all ingredients in a small stock pot or rondeau and cook over low heat for ~1-1.5 hours
Cook to al dente, check before removing from heat.
Cool in a hotel pan at room temperature, in a single layer.
Once steam has left, reserve to blast chiller to fully cool down.
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler.
